case_title: TOBIN, KEVIN VS EL SINEITTI, JOE DBA 19TH AVE. B.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,684.56 FILED BY TOBIN, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOE DBA 19TH AVE. B.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOE DBA 19TH AVE. B.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOBIN, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOE DBA 19TH AVE. B.P. $215.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $270.00, JUDGMENT FOR COST OF BOOTS AND LABOR. PLTF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EL SINEITTI, JOE DBA 19TH AVE. B.P.
